数据表格对接后台接口，并实现分页操作

vue文件，前端接口仍是comic

<template>
  <div>
    <el-table
      :data="tableData"
      border
      style="width: 100%">
      <el-table-column
        fixed
        prop="id"
        label="编号"
        width="50">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="name"
        label="番名"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>

      <el-table-column
        prop="issueTime"
        label="诞生时间"
        width="200">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typeone"
        label="类型一"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typetwo"
        label="类型二"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typethree"
        label="类型三"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="message"
        label="描述"
        width="379">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        fixed="right"
        label="操作"
        width="100">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button @click="handleClick(scope.row)" type="text" size="small">查看</el-button>
          <el-button type="text" size="small">编辑</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <el-pagination
      background
      layout="prev, pager, next"
      page-size="3"
      :total="total"
      @current-change="page">
    </el-pagination>
  </div>

</template>

<script>
import axios from "axios";

export default {

  data() {
    return {
      total:null,
      tableData: []
    }
  },

  methods: {
    handleClick(row) {
      console.log(row);
    },
    //分页操作
    page(currentPage){
      axios.get("http://localhost:8181/data/"+currentPage+"/3").then(res=>(
        this.tableData=res.data.data,
          this.total=res.data.count
      ));
    }
  },

  //获取后台接口数据
  created() {
    // const this_ = this;
    axios.get("http://localhost:8181/data/1/3").then(res=>(
      this.tableData=res.data.data,
      this.total=res.data.count
    ));
  }
}
</script>

实现表单新增数据的操作

表单页面

<template>
<!--  <el-container>-->			<!--ref与下面的data绑定，rules与下面的规则绑定-->
    <el-form :model="ruleForm" :rules="rules" ref="ruleForm" label-width="100px" class="demo-ruleForm">
      <el-form-item label="番剧名" prop="name">
        <el-input v-model="ruleForm.name"></el-input>		
          		<!-- v-model 和下面data中的值双向绑定，下面能直接拿到表单中输入的值，传到后端进行处理-->
          
      </el-form-item>

      <el-form-item label="诞生时间" required>
        <el-col :span="11">
          <el-form-item prop="issueTime">					<!--prop的值是下面定义的表单验证的规则-->
            <el-date-picker type="date" placeholder="选择日期" v-model="ruleForm.issueTime" style="width: 100%;"></el-date-picker>
          </el-form-item>
        </el-col>
      </el-form-item>


      <el-form-item label="类型一" prop="typeone">				
        <el-radio-group v-model="ruleForm.typeone">
          <el-radio label="热血"></el-radio>
          <el-radio label="搞笑"></el-radio>
          <el-radio label="恋爱"></el-radio>
        </el-radio-group>
      </el-form-item>

      <el-form-item label="类型二" prop="typetwo">
        <el-radio-group v-model="ruleForm.typetwo">
          <el-radio label="校园"></el-radio>
          <el-radio label="日常"></el-radio>
          <el-radio label="异世界"></el-radio>
        </el-radio-group>
      </el-form-item>

      <el-form-item label="类型三" prop="typethree">
        <el-select v-model="ruleForm.typethree" placeholder="请选择类型三">
          <el-option label="最多追番" value="最多追番"></el-option>
          <el-option label="镇站之宝" value="镇站之宝"></el-option>
          <el-option label="评分爆表" value="评分爆表"></el-option>
        </el-select>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item label="简介" prop="message">
        <el-input type="textarea" v-model="ruleForm.message"></el-input>
      </el-form-item>
      <el-form-item>
        <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm('ruleForm')">立即添加</el-button>	
          <!--直接带着表单中的数据传到submitForm方法-->
        <el-button @click="resetForm('ruleForm')">重置</el-button>
      </el-form-item>
    </el-form>
<!--  </el-container>-->
</template>
<script>
import axios from "axios";

export default {
  data() {
    return {
      ruleForm: {
        name: '',
        issueTime: '',
        typeone: '',
        typetwo: '',
        typethree: '',
        message: ''
      },
      rules: {
          //每个属性对应一个验证规则
          //blur 失去焦点提醒
          //change 发生改变提醒
        name: [
          { required: true, message: '请输入番名', trigger: 'blur' },
          { min: 1, max: 30, message: '长度在 1 到 30 个字符', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        issueTime: [
          { type: 'date', required: true, message: '请选择日期', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        typeone: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        typetwo: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        typethree: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        message: [
          { required: true, message: '请填写番剧简介', trigger: 'blur' }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  methods: {
    submitForm(formName) {
      this.$refs[formName].validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {			//如果通过了所有验证，那么提交数据到后端
          // 向后端传数据直接在url后面加逗号，然后跟上封装好的数据即可
          axios.post("http://localhost:8181/save",this.ruleForm).then(res=>(
            this.$message({
              message:("又多了一部番哦，记得按时追哦~~"),
              type:"success"
            }),
            this.$router.push('/pageOne')		//跳转到动漫列表页
          ))
          console.log(this.ruleForm)
        } else {
          console.log('error submit!!');
          return false;
        }
      });
    },
    resetForm(formName) {
      this.$refs[formName].resetFields();
    },
   
  }
}
</script>

后端处理添加操作

ComicService的实现类ComicServiceImpl中

把ComicTypeVO转成comic才能存入数据库，那么跟上次渲染表单相反转换就好

@Override
public int saveData(ComicTypeVO comicTypeVO) {

    Comic comic = new Comic();
    BeanUtils.copyProperties(comicTypeVO, comic);			//comicTypeVO赋值给comic

    QueryWrapper<ComicType> wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();

    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypeone());
    comic.setTypeoneid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();							//注意每次都要new一个新的wrapper
    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypetwo());
    comic.setTypetwoid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypethree());
    comic.setTypethreeid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    //表单做了非空验证，所以这里可以不做非空判断，如果表单传来的数据有控制，会造成空指针异常
    int res = comicMapper.insert(comic);
    return res;
}

Controller层暴露接口

@PostMapping("/save")
public String saveComic(@RequestBody ComicTypeVO comicTypeVO){
    
    //这里很重要的一点
    //@RequestBody必须加上，前端传来的不是Java对象，而是一个json字符串
    //这里需要加上@RequestBody把传来的json字符串转为Java对象才能进行后续操作
    
    int res = comicService.saveData(comicTypeVO);
    if (res == 1){
        return "success";
    }else {
        return "error";
    }

}

实现修改和删除数据

修改数据

点击修改，跳转到修改页面，从根据要修改数据的id，从后端查出对应的数据，传回前端，通过v-model双向绑定渲染到页面中，进行修改。点击提交后，再传到后端，通过id将数据库中的信息完成修改

完成后再跳到列表页面

列表页：

<template>
  <div>
    <el-table
      :data="tableData"
      border
      style="width: 100%;">
      <el-table-column
        fixed
        prop="id"
        label="编号"
        width="50">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="name"
        label="番名"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>

      <el-table-column
        prop="issueTime"
        label="诞生时间"
        width="200">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typeone"
        label="类型一"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typetwo"
        label="类型二"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="typethree"
        label="类型三"
        width="120">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        prop="message"
        label="描述"
        width="379">
      </el-table-column>
      <el-table-column
        fixed="right"
        label="操作"
        width="100">
        <template slot-scope="scope">
          <el-button @click="edit(scope.row)" type="text" size="small">修改</el-button>
          <el-button @click="deleteById(scope.row.id)" type="text" size="small">删除</el-button>
        </template>
      </el-table-column>
    </el-table>
    <el-pagination
      background
      layout="prev, pager, next"
      page-size="5"
      :total="total"
      @current-change="page">
    </el-pagination>
  </div>

</template>

<script>
import axios from "axios";

export default {


  data() {
    return {
      total:null,
      tableData: [],
    }
  },

  methods: {
    edit(row) {						//通过路由跳转到修改页面，并携带数据id
      this.$router.push({
        path: '/pageThree',
        query: {
          id: row.id
        }
      })
    },

    deleteById(id){
      // alert(id);
      axios.delete("http://localhost:8181/delete/"+id).then(res=>(
        console.log(res),
        this.$message({
          message:"删除成功-_-#",
          type:"success"
        }),
        window.location.reload()        //删除成功后，刷新页面，然删掉的数据不在显示
      ))
    },

    //分页操作
    page(currentPage){
      axios.get("http://localhost:8181/data/"+currentPage+"/"+5).then(res=>(
        this.tableData=res.data.data,
          this.total=res.data.count
      ));
    }
  },

  //获取后台接口数据
  created() {
    // const this_ = this;
    axios.get("http://localhost:8181/data/1/5").then(res=>(
      this.tableData=res.data.data,
      this.total=res.data.count
    ));
  }
}
</script>

      <el-button type="primary" @click="update('ruleForm')">立即更新</el-button>
      <el-button @click="resetForm('ruleForm')">重置</el-button>
      <!--        <el-button v-on:click="test"></el-button>-->
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>
  <!--  </el-container>-->
</template>
<script>
import axios from "axios";

export default {
  data() {
    return {
      ruleForm: {
        name: '',
        issueTime: '',
        typeone: '',
        typetwo: '',
        typethree: '',
        message: ''
      },
      rules: {
        name: [
          { required: true, message: '请输入番名', trigger: 'blur' },
          { min: 1, max: 30, message: '长度在 1 到 30 个字符', trigger: 'blur' }
        ],
        issueTime: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择日期', trigger: 'change' }		//注意这里把date限制去掉
        ],
        typeone: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        typetwo: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        typethree: [
          { required: true, message: '请选择番剧类型', trigger: 'change' }
        ],
        message: [
          { required: true, message: '请填写番剧简介', trigger: 'blur' }
        ]
      }
    };
  },
  methods: {
    update(formName) {
      this.$refs[formName].validate((valid) => {
        if (valid) {
          // alert('submit!');
          // 向后端传数据直接在url后面加逗号，然后跟上封装好的数据即可
          axios.post("http://localhost:8181/updateData",this.ruleForm).then(res=>(
            this.$message({
              message:("成功修改了番剧信息~^_^~"),
              type:"success"
            }),
              this.$router.push('/pageOne')
          ))
          // console.log(this.ruleForm)
        } else {
          console.log('error submit!!');
          return false;
        }
      });
    },
    resetForm(formName) {
      this.$refs[formName].resetFields();
    },

  },
  created() {
    const id = this.$route.query.id;
    axios.get("http://localhost:8181/updateData/"+id).then(res=>(
      this.ruleForm=res.data,
      console.log(res.data)
    ))
  }
}
</script>

主要操作

edit(row) {						//通过路由跳转到修改页面，并携带数据id
    this.$router.push({
        path: '/pageThree',
        query: {
            id: row.id
        }
    })
    
    
    
created() {
    const id = this.$route.query.id;		//拿到上面通过路由跳转传来的数据
    axios.get("http://localhost:8181/updateData/"+id).then(res=>(
      this.ruleForm=res.data,
      console.log(res.data)
    ))
  }
 

/路由跳转和传数据	$router   跳转到后拿数据  $route

根据id查询和修改处理：

Service层：

//根据id拿到要修改的数据
@Override
public ComicTypeVO getDataById(Integer id) {

    Comic comic = comicMapper.selectById(id);
    ComicTypeVO comicTypeVO = new ComicTypeVO();
    BeanUtils.copyProperties(comic,comicTypeVO);

    QueryWrapper<ComicType> wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("id",comic.getTypeoneid());
    comicTypeVO.setTypeone(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getName());

    wrapper=new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("id",comic.getTypetwoid());
    comicTypeVO.setTypetwo(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getName());

    wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("id",comic.getTypethreeid());
    comicTypeVO.setTypethree(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getName());

    return comicTypeVO;
}

//传回对象，根据对象的id修改数据
@Override
public int doUpdate(ComicTypeVO comicTypeVO) {
    Comic comic = new Comic();
    BeanUtils.copyProperties(comicTypeVO, comic);

    QueryWrapper<ComicType> wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();

    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypeone());
    System.out.println(comicTypeVO.getTypeone());
    comic.setTypeoneid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypetwo());
    comic.setTypetwoid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    wrapper = new QueryWrapper<>();
    wrapper.eq("name", comicTypeVO.getTypethree());
    comic.setTypethreeid(comicTypeMapper.selectOne(wrapper).getId());

    System.out.println("最后是+++"+comic);

    int res = comicMapper.updateById(comic);
    return res;
}

Controller层：

@GetMapping("/updateData/{id}")
public ComicTypeVO updataData(@PathVariable Integer id){
    return comicService.getDataById(id);
}

@PostMapping("/updateData")
public String doUpdate(@RequestBody ComicTypeVO comicTypeVO){
    int res = comicService.doUpdate(comicTypeVO);
    if (res == 1){
        return "success";
    }else {
        return "error";
    }
}

删除数据

列表页面JS前端处理删除操作：

<el-button @click="deleteById(scope.row.id)" type="text" size="small">删除</el-button>
deleteById(id){
  // alert(id);
  axios.delete("http://localhost:8181/delete/"+id).then(res=>(
    console.log(res),
    this.$message({
      message:"删除成功-_-#",
      type:"success"
    }),
    window.location.reload()        //删除成功后，刷新页面，然删掉的数据不在显示
  ))
},

后端处理：

@DeleteMapping("/delete/{id}")
public String deleteById(@PathVariable Integer id){
    int res = comicMapper.deleteById(id);
    if (res==1){
        return "success";
    }else {
        return "error";
    }
}
